nasb.text: “Because you have said, ‘These two nations and these two lands will be mine, and we will possess them,’ although the Lord was there,

esv.text: “Because you said, ‘These two nations and these two countries shall be mine, and we will take possession of them’—although the Lord was there—

cnv.text: “‘因為你曾說：這兩國這兩邦都必歸我，我必得它們為業，但其實耶和華還是在那裡。

ccb.text: “‘因为你曾说，犹大和以色列必归我，即使上帝在那里，我们也要吞并他们。
